creator: Studded@dal.net
text:
This sounds like a bad floppy to me. :-/ I would suggest you try:

1. Get a shiny new floppy
2. Try the floppy image from the latest 2.2.6-Beta on
22releng.freebsd.org
3. Make SURE that you transfer the image in binary mode
4. Report back to freebsd-gnats-submit and let us know if it worked. :)

Good luck,

Doug
